import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class TrafficPredictor(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, in_channels=12, hidden_channels=64, out_channels=12):
        super().__init__()
        self.lin1 = nn.Linear(in_channels, hidden_channels)
        self.lin2 = nn.Linear(hidden_channels, hidden_channels)
        self.lin3 = nn.Linear(hidden_channels, out_channels)

    def forward(self, x, adj_norm):
        # x: [B, N, in_channels], adj_norm: [N, N] or [B, N, N]
        if x.dim() == 2:
            x = x.unsqueeze(0)
        B = x.shape[0]
        if adj_norm.dim() == 2:
            adj_norm = adj_norm.unsqueeze(0).expand(B, -1, -1)
        # Ensure dtype consistency
        if adj_norm.dtype != x.dtype:
            adj_norm = adj_norm.to(x.dtype)
        x = F.relu(self.lin1(x))
        x = torch.bmm(adj_norm, x)
        x = F.relu(self.lin2(x))
        x = torch.bmm(adj_norm, x)
        x = self.lin3(x)
        return x
